title: Silky Smooth Ethiopian Lamb Fir Fir
description: A traditional Ethiopian dish made with lamb, tinned tomatoes, and spices, cooked to a silky smooth texture in a tagine on a salt block, perfect for kids and adults alike
instructions: Preheat the salt block in the oven at 400 degrees for 30 minutes before cooking
Chop the onion, garlic, and ginger into small pieces and set aside
Heat the olive oil in the tagine on the preheated salt block over medium heat
Add the chopped onion, garlic, and ginger to the tagine and cook until the onion is translucent
Add the lamb shoulder to the tagine, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks
Add the tinned tomatoes, berbere spice, salt, and black pepper to the tagine and stir well
Reduce heat to low and simmer the mixture for 1 hour, stirring occasionally
Use two forks to shred the lamb into small pieces and stir well to combine
Serve the silky smooth Ethiopian lamb fir fir hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro
